desc: In src/core.js, the mitt-style event emitter's off(type, handler) function looks up the handler with handlers.indexOf(handler) and then unconditionally calls handlers.splice(i, 1). When the given handler was never registered for that type, indexOf returns -1, and splice(-1, 1) wrongly removes the LAST registered handler instead of doing nothing. Fix off() in src/core.js so it only splices when the handler was actually found (guard on i !== -1), so that tests/emitter.test.ts passes.
